conditional: The move depends on the clubs agreeing terms.
headline: Julián Álvarez wants Barcelona transfer
body: Julián Álvarez has expressed his desire for a transfer to fulfill his dream, with Barcelona being his preferred destination.
text:
🚨💣 BREAKING! Julián Álvarez: “The best thing for me is a TRANSFER and I want to FULFILL MY DREAM”. 🔥

As always reported, Julián has agreed to join Barça and wants the move. It depends on clubs now…

…after €100m bid rejected few weeks ago.
draft_caption:
Unconfirmed report RUMOUR | Julián Álvarez wants Barcelona transfer

#FPLVortex #Transfers
